# Get Credentialing Done
> Comprehensive insurance credentialing and medical billing services for healthcare providers.

Get Credentialing Done provides outsourced credentialing and billing services. Serving individual providers, groups, and healthcare organizations across the USA.

## Services
- Medicare Credentialing: Medicare Part A, Part B, PECOS, and Revalidations.
- Medicaid Credentialing: State-specific Medicaid plans.
- Commercial Credentialing: Aetna, Cigna, BCBS, UnitedHealthcare, etc.
- Medical Billing & Coding: Maximizing reimbursements and managing claims.
- Individual Provider Credentialing
- Group Credentialing & Affiliations

## Contact
